goal: Reconceive vince-course-study into a SIMPLER, exam-focused course-revision skill: completely cover all course content and distill it into efficient, Feynman-explained revision notes (Markdown/PDF), with light supplementary-source finding. Drop interactive quizzing / spaced-repetition / Anki / adaptive diagnosis (rejected as too complex). Overwrite the old skill in place.
